name: discord-mcp-server
description: Manage Discord servers via 70+ MCP tools — messages, channels, roles, moderation, webhooks, and more.

DISCORD_GUILD_ID.description: Default Discord server ID (optional, used as fallback when guildId is omitted)

DISCORD_OPERATOR_ID.description: Your Discord user ID for message attribution and audit logging (optional)

DISCORD_AUDIT_PATH.description: Custom path for audit log files (optional, defaults to app directory)

DISCORD_CONTACTS_PATH.description: Custom path for contacts.json storage (optional, defaults to app directory)
